LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM ENTRY OF DEFAULT IS GRANTED. WELLS FARGO HAS SHOWN EXCUSABLE NEGLECT PER CCP 473(B). THE STRONG PUBLIC POLICY FAVORING RESOLUTION OF DISPUTES ON THEIR MERITS ALSO FAVORS GRANTING THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2016 Set For Trial On Apr-03-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Set For Trial On Feb-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK'S Motion For Relief From Entry Of Default is granted. Wells Fargo has shown excusable neglect per CCP 473(b). The strong public policy favoring resolution of disputes on their merits also favors granting the motion. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
